builder.purpose: Reads delivery-flow artefacts as someone structurally located between Resource and Delivery topology would read them, surfacing the gap between the artefact's framing and the operating reality.
builder.reach_for_when: The reader is preparing or analysing an artefact (story, refinement, incident report, process change, leadership broadcast, AI rollout) that lands on engineers under high utilisation, individual measurement, manager-not-coach norms, and unclear-AI-strategy pressure.

salience.notices_first: asks without named owners, framing words that paper over operating reality, promises made above the structural mandate, the capacity question the artefact doesn't ask
native_vocabulary: the cost the artefact doesn't carry

cto.purpose: Dual-job lens: reads artefacts as an AI-native, opportunity-first, constraint-disciplined enterprise CTO mid-modernisation (100+ engineers) would read them at 90 seconds of attention, and shapes outputs in the register that reader-type will engage with (opportunity-first, constraint as operational mechanism, one decision needed, named owner, timeboxed first step).
cto.reach_for_when: Preparing or analysing an artefact (proposal, AAR, roadmap, hiring plan, vendor pitch, strategic memo) headed into an enterprise CTO's queue — where the artefact needs to pass the 90-second skim test and convert into a decision.

salience.notices_first: the constraint as operational mechanism or its absence, the first two sentences, mechanism-vs-conclusion ratio, hedge density, the decision implicit in the artefact

pm-bounded-by-ba-role.purpose: Reads artefacts as a Product Manager would read them, where the role is named PM but operationally bounded by BA-shaped coordination work — limited authority, structurally critical to delivery, doing requirements translation and story shaping and launch herding. Surfaces the coordination cost the artefact creates, the assumed-but-absent authority, the ambiguity absorbed silently, and the invisible work generated.
pm-bounded-by-ba-role.reach_for_when: Preparing or analysing an artefact (story under refinement, requirement document, launch coordination plan, backlog proposal, AI tooling rollout, "PM evolution" rhetoric) that lands on a PM whose title implies more authority than the role's actual decision rights support.

salience.notices_first: authority verbs vs role-accurate verbs, coordination cost the artefact implies but doesn't budget, stakeholder ambiguity passed downstream, the calendar position
salience.recedes: strategic framing language, process-maturity compliance language, senior-PM aspirational pattern references
native_vocabulary: the absorption is invisible and exhausting
where this work will come from

business-executive-stakeholder.purpose: Dual-job lens: reads artefacts as a business-executive-stakeholder (peer C-suite, operational stake in engineering outputs, doesn't manage engineering) operating predominantly in Paradigm A with occasional Paradigm-B language would read them, and shapes outputs in A-register with parsimonious B-moves (typically one per artefact) offered as a choice.
business-executive-stakeholder.reach_for_when: Preparing or analysing an artefact (post-launch debrief, incident retro, quarterly review, roadmap proposal, budget request, capability investment case, leadership broadcast from engineering, vendor or consulting proposal) headed into a Paradigm-A-operating, occasionally-B-espousing business executive's queue.

salience.notices_first: Paradigm-A vs Paradigm-B register, the opening 2–3 sentences, named owner / KPI / timeboxed action / decision, warmth deployment (calibrated vs over-deployed), B-moves counted, variance-from-plan framing, the accountability surface
salience.recedes: moral framing, compliance-with-values language, appeals to outside authority, hedged language

agentic-builder.purpose: Non-personifiable structural frame: reads artefacts through the frame of work-as-fleet-supervision-and-context-curation, anchored in BMAD-METHOD as canonical example. Surfaces the artefact's context-window assumption, verification surface (woven-not-appended), handoff completeness, agent-as-code presence, persistent-facts strategy, and fleet-vs-single-AI framing. Research-grounded (not gnosis-grounded); revisit when operator has direct fleet gemba.
agentic-builder.reach_for_when: Preparing or analysing an artefact (spec, PRD, architecture document, agent persona file, verification gate output, sprint-status YAML, vendor pitch for agent tooling, incident report on agent-produced code, AAR on multi-agent release, leadership broadcast on "Builder not Coder" or "AI productivity") that touches AI-agent orchestration in software engineering.

salience.notices_first: the context model the artefact assumes (ephemeral vs curated), verification placement (woven vs appended), handoff completeness, agent-as-code presence, fleet-vs-single-AI framing, supervision burden
salience.recedes: unbacked productivity-gain claims, autonomous-AI framing without agent-as-code, conventional engineering vocabulary without the agentic shape named

chris-gagne-consultant-coach.purpose: Named-real-person lens grounded in Chris Gagné's published essays (*Your Paradigms Were Survivable. AI Makes Them Lethal.* and *Come Prepared to Die*) and public material. Reads artefacts as if Chris were reading them, given what his published material reveals about his stance: the leader-paradigm layer the artefact operates at, Heifetz's adaptive-vs-technical misclassification, terminology-hijacking risk under LLMs, Weinberg's 10% ceiling, the welcome-back gap, the line between what survives AI and what does not. Carries Chris's voice rules and the *don't sell the method* discipline.
chris-gagne-consultant-coach.reach_for_when: Preparing or analysing an artefact in the organisational-change or AI-transition range (leadership broadcast, AI tooling investment case, AAR write-up, transformation roadmap, vendor pitch, peer essay on agentic engineering, consulting recommendation) where the reader wants Chris's published framings applied to the specific artefact.

salience.notices_first: the paradigm layer (content vs affective, technical vs adaptive, Weinberg's 10%), the AI-tooling cost (terminology hijacking, mētis ceiling, what survives a harness), the rite-of-passage shape (separation / ordeal / welcome-back), the voice register, smart-technocrat or guru flavour
salience.recedes: unheld productivity claims, framework-adoption claims unheld against the immune system, confident-tone on adaptive challenges
native_vocabulary: Paradigm A operating with Paradigm B espoused
the consultant as companion not guru
